title: 一箭双雕
meaning: 一箭双雕：比喻做一件事达到两个目的或同时获得两种成果。

scenes.title: 广阔的天空
scenes.description: A bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Two large eagles are flying side by side in the distance. Below is a green grassy plain.
scenes.prompt: A young, handsome Chinese hunter with short black hair, wearing traditional Hanfu robes in earthy tones (brown and beige), holding a wooden bow and arrow, standing in a vast ancient landscape., Soft watercolor illustration style, warm pastel color palette, gentle lighting, whimsical and educational children's book aesthetic, clean lines, no text, high quality, 2D vector art influence. scenes.title: 命中瞬间
scenes.description: The arrow hits both eagles simultaneously mid-flight. The eagles look surprised but are not harmed gruesomely, maintaining a gentle tone. The hunter watches intently.
